objective: Port the Triptych 3-pane hero section from vanilla HTML/GSAP into the Next.js `add-hello-world-feature` branch as a React component.
context: The vanilla HTML branch experienced incurable GSAP scroll-freezing bugs on trackpads. Decision was made to abandon vanilla HTML and migrate the Triptych design into the existing Next.js codebase which is already set up with React, Tailwind, GSAP, and Lenis.
next_steps: 2. Port the Triptych sliding panes into a reusable `<TriptychHero />` React component using `@gsap/react`.
3. Integrate the component into the Next.js application cleanly alongside the existing hero.
4. Verify buttery smooth scrolling and no freezing.
